text.title: Puppeteer Launch & Navigation Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for puppeteer-launch-setup.

conclusion.verdict: use @sparticuz/chromium pinned to a known good version
use puppeteer-core + custom binary path + pinned revision
keep sandbox enabled; mirror prod flags except --no-sandbox

text.example: env=ci → launch args include --no-sandbox + --disable-setuid-sandbox + --disable-dev-shm-usage; PUPPETEER_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/.puppeteer; default goto waitUntil=domcontentloaded. Rule: no-sandbox-in-container.
